name: jira.issue.transition
description: Transition a Jira Cloud issue to a new status. Pass either transitionId (fast) or transitionName (the plugin looks up the matching ID from the issue's available transitions).

configRefs.name: jira
configRefs.description: Generic config containing host (https://acme.atlassian.net), email, apiToken.

transitionId.description: ID of the transition to apply. Takes precedence over transitionName when both are set.

transitionName.description: Human-readable transition name, e.g. 'Done', 'In Progress'. Case-insensitive lookup.

comment.description: Optional comment added with the transition. Wrapped into ADF.

resolution.description: Optional resolution name to set when closing, e.g. 'Done', 'Won't Do'.

transitionId.description: ID of the transition that was applied.
